description:
Create a new Purchase Order in Axelor from supplier Grainger Industrial Supply. Log in with admin / admin, then navigate to the Purchases module (top menu bar or sidebar) and create a new purchase order with the following details:

- Supplier: Grainger Industrial Supply (already exists in the system)
- Add product line 1: Ergonomic Standing Desk - Height Adjustable, Quantity: 20, Unit Price: $420.00
- Add product line 2: USB-C Docking Station Pro, Quantity: 50, Unit Price: $105.00
- Add product line 3: Noise-Cancelling Headset Pro, Quantity: 30, Unit Price: $185.00

After adding all lines, save the purchase order and then click the 'Request' button in the toolbar to change the status from Draft to Requested.

Login credentials: admin / admin
